# Detection Red Flags Table

| Red flag | Possible interpretation | Caution |
|---|---|---|
| Synchronized posting | Coordinated campaign | Could also be news/event timing |
| Repeated captions | Shared brief or template | Memes and trends also repeat language |
| Media reuse | Centralized asset distribution | Reuse may be allowed or fan-driven |
| Sudden spike then flatline | Burst paid traffic or artificial boost | Viral events can also spike naturally |
| High views, weak conversion | Shallow or irrelevant traffic | Awareness campaigns may not aim for conversion |
| Generic comments | Pods, scripts, or low-quality engagement | Low-effort real users also write generic comments |
| Missing disclosure | Hidden sponsorship risk | Disclosure may exist elsewhere but still be inadequate |
| Metric definition ambiguity | Legitimacy inflation risk | Could be sloppy wording rather than deception |
| Attribution timing anomalies | Click flooding or hijacking | Requires technical data to confirm |
| Repeated reviewer profiles | Fake review network risk | Needs verification before accusation |
